content.name: Hotkey API
content.author: Chem O`Dun
content.description: Lets other mods register custom hotkey actions, bindable by the player through the native Options > Controls keybinding UI. MD and direct-Lua registration paths, no external dependencies.

text.description: Lets other mods register custom hotkey actions, bindable by the player through the native Options > Controls keybinding UI. MD and direct-Lua registration paths, no external dependencies.
